ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seating_instances" (
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seating instance */,
  "instance_file" TEXT /* File name of the seating instance */,
  "solver_type" TEXT /* Type of solver used to solve the seating problem */,
  "mi_type" TEXT /* MI (Mixed Integer) type used in the solver */,
  "ordering_type" INTEGER /* Ordering type used in the solver */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the seating area */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the seating area */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Total size of the seating area */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the seating area */,
  "number_of_groups" INTEGER /* Number of groups in the seating problem */,
  "number_of_people" INTEGER /* Total number of people in the seating problem */,
  "number_of_groups_seated" INTEGER /* Number of groups successfully seated */,
  "number_of_people_seated" INTEGER /* Number of people successfully seated */,
  "percentage_seated" REAL /* Percentage of groups seated */,
  "percentage_occupied" REAL /* Percentage of seats occupied */,
  "percentage_empty" REAL /* Percentage of seats empty */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the seating arrangement is valid */,
  "all_seated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if all groups are seated */,
  "timeout" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the solver timed out */,
  "out_of_memory" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the solver ran out of memory */,
  "solving_time" TEXT /* Time taken to solve the seating problem */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the event is held */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the instance was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the instance */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event for which the seating is planned */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "solver_version" TEXT /* Version of the solver used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the instance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seating_instances_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES event_venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seating_instances_solver_type FOREIGN KEY ("solver_type") REFERENCES solver_types ("solver_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seating_instances_mi_type FOREIGN KEY ("mi_type") REFERENCES mi_types ("mi_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seating_instances_ordering_type FOREIGN KEY ("ordering_type") REFERENCES ordering_types ("ordering_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solver_types" (
  "solver_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solver type */,
  "solver_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the solver type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the solver type */,
  "solver_version" TEXT /* Version of the solver */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the solver type was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the solver type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solver_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mi_types" (
  "mi_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MI type */,
  "mi_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the MI type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the MI type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the MI type was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the MI type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mi_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ordering_types" (
  "ordering_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ordering type */,
  "ordering_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ordering type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ordering type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the ordering type was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the ordering type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ordering_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seating_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seating instance */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., percentage, seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seating_metrics_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES seating_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seating_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seating instance */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error (e.g., Timeout, OutOfMemory) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Detailed error message */,
  "error_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error occurred */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the error has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seating_errors_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES seating_instances ("instance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, planner, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "instance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seating instance being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the instance */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the instance was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, run) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_instance_id FOREIGN KEY ("instance_id") REFERENCES seating_instances ("instance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the venue */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue (e.g., conference hall, meeting room) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the venue */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)
